description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsBlack textured upper with a slim flap that has a magnetic closureHas two pockets in the front with magnetic closuresOne adjustable shoulder strapFabric inner inside the main compartment with a zipped pocket, two pouches and a zipped separatorMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 33 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 18 cm
